summary: Iteration 127: Voice Assignment Feature testing complete. Backend: 10/12 tests passed (2 intermittent network failures). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Voice Map section, Auto-assign button, 17 character voice dropdowns, narrator selector. Voice dropdowns are editable and persist changes to backend.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: auto_assign_voices endpoint (lines 49-168) correctly uses Claude to analyze characters and assign voices
Backend: update_voice_map endpoint (lines 173-199) correctly merges with existing map
Backend: get_voice_map endpoint (lines 201-220) returns voice_map and voice_details
Backend: _run_narration_background (lines 265-318) correctly uses voice_map for dubbed mode
Frontend: loadVoiceMap, autoAssignVoices, updateCharVoice functions (lines 615-650) work correctly
Frontend: Voice Map UI (lines 2065-2115) displays character voice dropdowns with data-testid attributes
Frontend: All 24 ElevenLabs voices available in dropdowns
Frontend: Voice changes persist to backend via POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/voice-map
seed_data_creation: Used existing project d27afb0e79ff (ADÃO E EVA - BIBLIZOO 2 - 17 characters with voice assignments)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 127 complete. Voice assignment feature fully verified. Project d27afb0e79ff has 17 characters with AI-assigned voices. Voice Map section is in Step 2 (Characters) of Directed Studio. Auto-assign button triggers Claude analysis. Voice dropdowns allow manual override. All voice IDs are valid ElevenLabs voices from the 24-voice catalog.
